content: We can reframe the architecture of 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory around the intrinsic curiosity mechanism of ICM-driven autonomous agents, where unlabeled high-uncertainty data points selected for active learning annotation are treated as "curiosity peaks" that get priority encoding into long-term agent memory, rather than only being sampled for model improvement. This lets agents simultaneously refine their predictive world models and build a semantically structured memory schema anchored to what they found most surprising to begin with.
